name: solstice-platform
description: Access Solstice workspaces, reviews, and documents, including append-only HTML and PDF versions.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Solstice reviews and document versions
interface.longDescription: Access authorized Solstice workspaces, brands, projects, content reviews, review activity, documents, and append-only HTML or PDF versions.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Solstice workspaces I can access.
Open a document from a Solstice content review.
Add this HTML or PDF as a new version in a Solstice review.
